acts.title: Act 1 — Metroscope indexes a Rust codebase with Claude-generated summaries and serves a navigable function-level map via HTTP for editor integration.

7eabfa69-5487-4f59-8e46-82faea00bcea.title: Watch index file and hot-reload without restart
7eabfa69-5487-4f59-8e46-82faea00bcea.description:
The server loads index.json once at startup and requires a manual restart after re-indexing. A file watcher (notify crate) would make the editor integration seamless.

Component: metroscope-server | Difficulty: easy

f668358a-3be8-484b-880b-1d0de66d2b97.title: Add retry and partial-failure recovery for LLM batch calls
f668358a-3be8-484b-880b-1d0de66d2b97.description:
A single API error aborts the entire indexing run, discarding all prior LLM work. Retrying failed batches and writing a partial index on interrupt would make large-project indexing resilient.

Component: metroscope-indexer | Difficulty: medium

5dfdd814-dd1d-4966-bf2c-e2981329417e.title: Replace ad-hoc println logging with structured tracing
5dfdd814-dd1d-4966-bf2c-e2981329417e.description:
All observability is via println!/eprintln!, making it impossible to filter, sample, or ship logs in production. The tracing crate is already common in the axum ecosystem.

Component: system | Difficulty: medium

fe349b6c-855c-439d-89f3-dbe43b6ae193.title: Add incremental re-indexing with file-level caching
fe349b6c-855c-439d-89f3-dbe43b6ae193.description:
Every re-index re-calls the LLM for every function, even unchanged ones. Caching summaries by file hash would cut API cost and latency by 80-90% for typical edit cycles.

Component: metroscope-indexer | Difficulty: medium

77fccea6-f66c-4b9d-a237-9aa1c0c1a6c9.title: Bind to 127.0.0.1 only with configurable auth token
77fccea6-f66c-4b9d-a237-9aa1c0c1a6c9.description:
The server uses CorsLayer::permissive() and binds to localhost with no authentication, so any local process or browser tab can read the full index. A static bearer token would close this.

Component: metroscope-server | Difficulty: easy

ead3edf1-b9b1-46fe-af08-89f83589b276.title: Abstract language parser behind a trait
ead3edf1-b9b1-46fe-af08-89f83589b276.description:
The indexer is hardcoded to Rust/tree-sitter with no language dispatch layer. Adding JS/TS (stated intent in team memory) will require threading a trait boundary through the entire pipeline now rather than later.

Component: metroscope-indexer | Difficulty: hard
